common.locationUnavailable: Location is not available on this device.

email_unverified.title: Please verify your email
email_unverified.body: Core ride, trip, and safety actions stay locked until your campus email is verified.

pending.title: Your account is waiting for admin approval
pending.body: You can review your account, but ride requests, trips, SOS, and live location actions are locked for now.

rejected.title: Your account approval was rejected
rejected.body: Core MovU actions are locked. Contact a MovU administrator if this needs another review.

banned.title: Your account is banned
banned.body: MovU actions are locked for this account. Contact a MovU administrator for support.

driver_only.title: Driver tools require a driver account
driver_only.body: Switch to a driver account to register vehicles, post trips, and manage rider recommendations.

auth.hero: Verified carpooling within 30km of Taylor's University.
auth.driverHero: Driver dispatch, rider pickup, chat, and live location for Taylor's carpool trips.
auth.studentLoginNote: Student accounts request rides, receive system-assigned drivers, chat, and watch live driver location.
auth.driverLoginNote: Driver accounts manage vehicles, accept assigned riders, share location, and chat with passengers.
auth.verifyNotice: Paste the email verification token from your inbox.
auth.accountCreated: Account created. Check your email for the verification link before logging in.
auth.emailVerified: Email verified. You can sign in now.

home.intro: Plan verified campus rides inside the Taylor's University 30km service area.
home.serviceBody: Origins and destinations are validated against Taylor's Lakeside Campus before a ride or trip is created.
home.verifyBody: Use your campus email and wait for admin account or vehicle approval.
home.matchBody: Riders request routes, drivers post trips, MovU recommends overlaps.
home.safeBody: Share live location, trigger SOS, then rate or report after completion.

ride.title: Request ride
ride.subtitle: Pick both points inside Taylor's 30km service area. Route distance is calculated by the API.
ride.chooseBoth: Choose both origin and destination on the map.

drive.title: Drive
drive.subtitle: Register a vehicle, wait for approval, then post trips inside the Taylor's service area.
drive.tripStarted: Trip started. Riders can now see the driver location.

map.outsideArea: That point is outside Taylor's University {{radius}}km service area.

safety.label: Safety
safety.title: SOS should be one tap away.
safety.subtitle: MovU finds your current or recent trip, grabs your live location, then asks you to confirm the emergency call.
safety.noActiveTrip: No active or recent trip found
safety.confirmBody: Admins will receive an emergency alert for trip #{{tripId}} with your live coordinates.
safety.empty: No driver trips are attached to this account.

accountPage.paymentBody: Payment collection stays unavailable until MovU configures and approves a production payment provider.
